hero.sub: Foodia tracks your nutrition, exercise, and daily progress with AI — just take a photo of your meal and let the magic happen.
feat.sub: Five powerful sections to track every aspect of your health — from your morning coffee to your evening workout.
card1.p: Calorie summary, macro breakdown, water intake, and 15/30-day trends — all at a glance every morning.
card2.p: Snap a photo, describe your meal, or scan a barcode. AI detects the dish and calculates full nutrition in seconds.
card3.p: Describe your workout in plain text and AI extracts each exercise, sets, reps, and calories burned automatically.
card4.p: Navigate any past day to review or edit your food and workout log. Your full history, always accessible.
card5.p: Set your goals, track BMR/TDEE, manage allergies, and export your full nutritional history as a PDF.
card6.p: Ask your personal AI nutritionist anything about your diet, macros, or health goals — 24/7, in any language.
ai.p: Point your camera at any meal and Foodia's AI instantly identifies the dish, detects visible ingredients, estimates the full recipe, and delivers a complete nutritional breakdown — calories, macros, micros, and NutriScore rating.
ai.f1: Photo, text, or barcode scanner input
ai.f2: Automatic dish detection with confidence score
ai.f4: NutriScore quality rating from A to E
ex.p: No more tedious manual logging. Just describe your session the way you'd tell a friend — "4 sets bench press 80 kg × 10, 30 min running" — and Foodia's AI parses each exercise and calculates calories burned using MET values.
ex.f5: Full exercise history with editable names
prog.p: The progress calendar gives you a complete picture of your nutritional journey. Tap any day to see consumed vs burned calories, your balance, and the full list of meals and workouts — with the ability to edit anything, anytime.
prog.f4: Full meal and exercise log per day
prog.f5: Edit or add entries for any past day
pro.sub: Start for free. Upgrade when you need more.
free.f1: 3 AI uses / day (food, exercise or chat)
perk1.p: Scan and analyze as many meals as you want, every single day.
perk2.p: Chat without limits with your personal AI nutritionist.
perk3.p: Download your complete nutritional history with images included.
dl.p: Download Foodia for free on the App Store.
